backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the FinanceWise AI backend defining all stable state variables, data types, and logic for user profiles, transactions, expenses, budgets, AI predictions, chat, quiz, blog, and financial wellness features.
feature_evidence.json: A feature evidence report JSON file with an empty features array, indicating no features have been documented yet.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key functionality of every page, component, and hook in the frontend.
frontend/.env.example: Example environment variable file for the frontend, defining the VITE_APP_VERSION build-time variable and optional build metadata fields.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry point for the FinanceWise AI frontend, including SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter cards, Google Analytics, Google AdSense, structured data (JSON-LD), and favicon links.
frontend/netlify.toml: Netlify configuration file specifying the build settings, SPA redirect rules, ads.txt serving, security headers, and long-term cache control for static assets.
frontend/public/_headers: Netlify public headers file that sets content type, cache control, and robots tag specifically for the ads.txt file.
frontend/public/_redirects: Netlify redirects file ensuring ads.txt is served directly and all other routes fall back to index.html for SPA routing.
frontend/public/ads.txt: Google AdSense ads.txt file declaring the authorized digital seller with publisher ID pub-5050836253831761.
frontend/public/favicon.svg: SVG favicon for FinanceWise AI featuring a dark blue circle with a stylized currency symbol, a green growth arrow, and gold accent dots.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component that sets up TanStack Router with all public and private routes, QueryClient, ThemeProvider, auth guard wrapper, and cookie consent, including routes for Net Worth, Emergency Fund, and Spending Limits.
frontend/src/components/AccessDenied.tsx: Displays a full-screen 'Access Denied' card for unauthenticated users, offering a login button via Internet Identity and a link to navigate home.
frontend/src/components/AIChatbot.tsx: Floating AI chatbot component that sends user messages to the backend, displays assistant responses with optional inline spending charts or balance cards, and supports keyboard submission.
frontend/src/components/AnalyticsGuard.t: A route guard component that blocks access to analytics content if the user has disabled analytics in their preferences, redirecting them to Settings or Dashboard instead.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Main application shell providing a responsive sidebar (desktop) and sheet drawer (mobile) with navigation links, logout functionality, and a content area for child routes.
frontend/src/components/BudgetAllocation: Renders a horizontal stacked bar chart comparing actual vs. target budget allocations across Needs, Wants, and Savings categories for a given budget mode.
frontend/src/components/BudgetSuggestion: Displays a styled suggestion card with an icon and message for budget suggestions, supporting 'warning', 'tip', and 'opportunity' types with distinct color themes.
frontend/src/components/BuildVersionBadg: A small badge component that displays the current application build version from buildInfo.
frontend/src/components/CookieConsent.ts: Shows a cookie consent banner at the bottom of the page for unauthenticated users, persisting acceptance in localStorage with a 365-day expiry.
frontend/src/components/CurrencyInput.ts: A numeric input field that prefixes the user's selected currency symbol, wrapping the shadcn Input component with currency-aware formatting.
frontend/src/components/ExchangeRateIndi: Displays the current USD exchange rate for the selected currency with a live/fallback status indicator and a refresh button to fetch updated rates.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site-wide footer with navigation link groups (Quick Links, Resources, Learning, Trust & Security), social media icons, and a version badge using the app's build info.
frontend/src/components/GoalDeleteConfir: A confirmation dialog component that prompts the user to confirm deletion of a financial goal, with Cancel and Delete buttons and a loading state.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the sticky site header with a logo, desktop navigation links, Login/Sign Up buttons, and a mobile slide-out sheet menu.
frontend/src/components/PerformanceMonit: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/PredictionResult: Displays AI-powered 3-month financial projections (savings, expenses, risk level, confidence) derived from transaction history, rendered as summary cards and Recharts line/bar charts.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal dialog form that collects a new user's name, ID, and email to initialize their profile, blocking dismissal until the form is submitted.
frontend/src/content/defaultBlogPosts.ts: Exports a static array of two default BlogPost objects (monthly budgeting and emergency fund guides) used as fallback content.
frontend/src/content/defaultQuizQuestion: Exports a large static array of default QuizQuestion objects covering topics like budgeting, organized by difficulty, with answers, explanations, and real-life tips.
Defines the StaticBlogArticle interface and exports an array of full-length static blog articles with metadata (slug, title, date, category, readTime, excerpt, featuredImage, fullContent) for display on the blog page.
frontend/src/content/staticProblemSoluti: Defines the StaticBlog interface and exports 15 static problem-solution finance blog entries covering common personal finance issues and their practical solutions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackendVersion.ts: React Query hook that fetches the backend version string from the actor, caching it indefinitely since it does not change at runtime.
frontend/src/hooks/useBudgetPlan.ts: Provides two hooks: useGetBudgetPlan for fetching the user's budget plan and useSaveBudgetPlan for saving it, both backed by React Query with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrency.ts: Hook that resolves the user's preferred currency from backend preferences, fetches live exchange rates, and exposes formatting and conversion utilities for USD-based amounts.
frontend/src/hooks/useDefaultContentInit: Provides a mock mutation hook that simulates default content initialization with a delay and invalidates blog/quiz queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central collection of React Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profile, preferences, transactions, savings goals, budget plans, and AI chat interactions.
frontend/src/hooks/useSEO.ts: Simple hook that updates the document title and meta description tag whenever the provided title or description values change.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for a purple-violet-blue theme (light and dark modes), applies a gradient background to the body, and styles custom scrollbars.
frontend/src/lib/blog/blogContentCache.t: Provides localStorage-based caching utilities for generated blog content, with a 7-day expiry, supporting load, save, and clear operations per post or for all posts.
frontend/src/lib/blog/generateAdsenseArt: Defines types for blog metadata and generated articles, and exports a function that generates long-form HTML article content based on a blog post slug, with a detailed personal finance example.
frontend/src/lib/budget-planner/budgetCa: Contains pure utility functions to calculate budget totals (needs/wants/savings), convert them to percentages of income, and compare actual percentages against target allocations for a given budget mode.
frontend/src/lib/budget-planner/budgetLo: Implements the core budget plan generation logic, taking detailed income and expense inputs to produce a structured BudgetPlan with rule-based allocations (50/30/20, 60/20/20, etc.), expense breakdowns, and assumptions.
frontend/src/lib/budget-planner/budgetMo: Defines budget mode types and their needs/wants/savings allocation percentages, category templates with default shares, and a function to generate a list of SmartBudgetCategory items for a given income and mode.
frontend/src/lib/budget-planner/budgetSu: Generates contextual budget suggestions (warnings, tips, opportunities) by comparing actual spending percentages against mode targets, flagging high-spending categories, and checking for emergency fund allocations.
frontend/src/lib/budget-planner/healthSc: Calculates a financial health score (0-100) from budget inputs and plan data across five weighted factors: savings rate, cash flow, emergency fund, debt management, and financial planning, returning a score with a human-readable explanation.
frontend/src/lib/budget-planner/progress: Calculates a form completion progress percentage (0-100) by weighting required fields at 70% and optional fields at 30%.
frontend/src/lib/budget-planner/projecti: Generates a 12-month savings projection array from a budget plan, computing monthly and cumulative savings for each calendar month.
frontend/src/lib/budget-planner/recommen: Generates personalized financial recommendations (saving strategy, investing guidance, financial improvement tips) based on budget inputs and plan data, tailored to savings rate, risk tolerance, and financial knowledge level.
frontend/src/lib/budget-planner/reminder: Generates an ICS calendar file string for a budget action step reminder scheduled 7 days from now, including a 15-minute alarm.
frontend/src/lib/buildInfo.ts: Exports build metadata (version, timestamp, git SHA, environment flags) sourced from Vite environment variables, plus a target version constant and helper to check if the current build matches it.
frontend/src/lib/currency.ts: Provides currency conversion and formatting utilities for USD, INR, and EUR using fixed exchange rates, including symbol lookup and locale-aware number formatting.
Implements a deterministic, API-free financial assistant engine that classifies user queries into categories and generates structured, context-aware responses with clarifying questions when queries are too vague.
frontend/src/lib/emergency-fund/calculat: Provides pure calculation functions for emergency fund features, including target amount, progress percentage, safety level, months covered, and savings plan projections.
frontend/src/lib/emergency-fund/suggesti: Generates up to five actionable emergency fund saving suggestions based on current savings progress, monthly expenses, and top spending categories.
frontend/src/lib/exchangeRates.ts: Fetches live USD-based exchange rates from an external API with localStorage caching (1-hour TTL) and fallback hardcoded rates for USD, INR, and EUR.
frontend/src/lib/goals/goalCoachSuggesti: Generates expense optimization suggestions from top spending categories and returns static income boost ideas to help users accelerate progress toward savings goals.
frontend/src/lib/goals/goalPlanning.ts: Provides utility functions to compute months/days remaining for a savings goal and derive planning metrics (progress, required savings rate, feasibility label, and warning messages) based on monthly income.
frontend/src/lib/goals/goalSimulation.ts: Generates three timeline simulation scenarios (current, +50% longer, -33% shorter) for a savings goal, calculating required monthly/daily savings and feasibility for each.
frontend/src/lib/goals/goalTracking.ts: Computes tracking status (on track vs. behind schedule) and a 0–100 performance score for a savings goal by comparing actual progress against time-proportional expected progress.
frontend/src/lib/performance.ts: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/lib/quizProgressStorage.ts: Provides localStorage-backed utilities to persist, load, update, and clear per-user quiz progress data, including tracking asked questions, correct/incorrect answers, and completion state.
frontend/src/lib/serialization.ts: Offers comprehensive serialization helpers for converting between Motoko (BigInt nanosecond timestamps) and JavaScript types, including recursive BigInt-to-number conversion and serialize/deserialize functions for transactions, goals, and user profiles.
frontend/src/lib/spending-limits/analysi: Calculates per-category spending totals from transactions, determines limit usage status (safe/warning/alert), and generates contextual budget messages and actionable spending suggestions based on spending limits.
frontend/src/lib/transactions/monthlyAgg: Aggregates current-month transaction data into income, expenses, available savings, and sorted category totals, with helper functions to retrieve individual aggregate values and top expense categories.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Static about page for FinanceWise AI describing the app's mission, vision, values, and key pillars like innovation, security, and transparency using a card grid layout.
frontend/src/pages/AIInsights.tsx: Displays AI-powered financial insights for authenticated users, including category spending breakdowns, monthly trends, and risk assessment using charts (bar, line, pie) and ML model descriptions (Linear Regression, GRU, LSTM).
frontend/src/pages/AITransparency.tsx: Static informational page explaining how the app's three AI models (Linear Regression, GRU, LSTM) work, their capabilities, limitations, and data privacy practices.
frontend/src/pages/Analytics.tsx: Analytics page for authenticated users that allows adding expense and income transactions via forms and visualizes them with pie, bar, and line charts broken down by category and time.
frontend/src/pages/Benefits.tsx: Static marketing page listing six key benefits of using FinanceWise AI (financial health, privacy, time savings, stress reduction, goal achievement, and free access) in a card grid.
frontend/src/pages/BlogAdmin.tsx: Admin page for authenticated users to initialize default blog content, triggering creation of 15 finance blog posts and 100 quiz questions via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPost.tsx: Renders a single blog post page fetched by slug, displaying the hero section, featured image, tags, and article content generated via `generateAdsenseArticle`. Handles loading and not-found states with appropriate UI.
frontend/src/pages/BudgetPlanner.tsx: Full-featured budget planner page that lets authenticated users generate, customize, and save budget plans by income and mode (student, professional, etc.), with category management, allocation charts, and AI suggestions.
frontend/src/pages/CAFeatures.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/Calculators.tsx: Provides tabbed financial calculators (SIP, Lumpsum, FIRE, Tax) for authenticated users, computing and displaying investment growth, retirement corpus, and tax liability results.
frontend/src/pages/Challenges.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/Compare.tsx: Static comparison page that displays a feature matrix contrasting FinanceWise AI against other financial tools using checkmark/cross icons.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with a form (name, email, message) that submits a `ContactSubmission` to the backend, alongside info cards for email, response time, and support hours.
frontend/src/pages/CookiePolicy.tsx: Static cookie policy page detailing the types of cookies used (essential, analytics, advertising, preference) with descriptions and lists of specific use cases.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerCare.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying financial overview cards (balance, income, expenses, savings), a pie chart of spending by category, recent transactions, savings goals, and an AI-powered future prediction feature.
frontend/src/pages/DeploymentInfo.tsx: Displays deployment metadata including frontend and backend version numbers, a sync status comparison between them, and build details; requires authentication via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/pages/Disclaimer.tsx: Static legal disclaimer page clarifying that FinanceWise AI is for educational purposes only and does not constitute financial, investment, tax, or legal advice.
frontend/src/pages/DNSCheck.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/EmergencyFund.tsx: Interactive emergency fund tracker that calculates target amounts based on monthly expenses, shows progress and coverage months, and generates saving plans and AI suggestions; requires authentication.
frontend/src/pages/FAQ.tsx: Static FAQ page rendering a list of 10 common questions and answers about FinanceWise AI in an accordion component.
frontend/src/pages/Features.tsx: Static marketing page listing eight key product features (AI insights, analytics, goal tracking, security, calculators, education, expense tracking, investments) as a grid of cards.
frontend/src/pages/FinanceBlog.tsx: Displays a personal finance blog page with a hero section, AdSense placeholder, category filter buttons, and a grid of article cards sourced from staticBlogArticles. Supports filtering by category and sets SEO metadata.
frontend/src/pages/FinanceDisclaimer.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/FinanceQuiz.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/FinancialWellness.tsx: Renders a Financial Wellness page displaying six themed cards covering emotional comfort, financial psychology, security, peace of mind, growth mindset, and community support.
frontend/src/pages/Goals.tsx: Full-featured savings goals page that lets authenticated users create, edit, delete, and track savings goals with AI-computed metrics, progress indicators, difficulty labels, and expense optimization suggestions.
frontend/src/pages/GoalTracker.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Marketing landing page for FinanceWise AI featuring a hero section, product description, feature highlights, AdSense placeholders, and calls-to-action linking to login and how-it-works pages.
frontend/src/pages/HowItWorks.tsx: Step-by-step explainer page describing the six stages of using FinanceWise AI, from account creation through AI analysis to achieving financial success, with a CTA to get started.
frontend/src/pages/InvestmentCalculators: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/Investments.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/Leaderboard.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/LearnFinance.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/Learning.tsx: Learning and quiz hub page for authenticated users showing quiz statistics, overall progress bar, topic cards, and achievement badges, with navigation to the quiz route.
frontend/src/pages/LearningStockMarket.t: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/Legal.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/LegalHub.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/LoansEMI.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page for FinanceWise AI that handles Internet Identity authentication, redirects authenticated users to the dashboard, and displays branding features alongside a sign-in card.
frontend/src/pages/MoneyPsychology.tsx: Interactive money psychology assessment page with 8 questions that scores user financial behavior and returns a personality type, risk tolerance, traits, and recommendations.
frontend/src/pages/NetWorth.tsx: Net worth tracker page that allows authenticated users to add/remove assets and liabilities by category, calculates net worth, and generates financial insights using backend canister queries.
frontend/src/pages/Privacy.tsx: Static privacy policy page with sections covering data collection, usage, sharing, security, retention, and contact information for FinanceWise AI.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicy.tsx: Detailed privacy policy page with styled cards covering personal/financial/usage data collection, how data is used, and blockchain-based storage specifics, wrapped in Header and Footer components.
frontend/src/pages/public/Home.tsx: Public-facing landing page with a hero section, three feature highlight cards (AI Insights, Analytics, Security), and a call-to-action directing users to login or the features page.
frontend/src/pages/PublicQuiz.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/Quiz.tsx: Financial literacy quiz page for authenticated users that steps through default quiz questions, tracks score and progress, shows answer feedback with explanations, and displays a completion summary.
frontend/src/pages/RefundPolicy.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/Resources.tsx: Displays a resources page with six categories (guides, videos, calculators, learning paths, templates, blog) as cards with navigation links. Includes a hero section, header, and footer.
frontend/src/pages/Roadmap.tsx: Renders a product roadmap page showing completed v1.0 features and upcoming planned features with statuses and ETAs. Includes header and footer components.
frontend/src/pages/Security.tsx: Displays a security and privacy overview page with six feature cards covering encryption, blockchain storage, Internet Identity, zero-knowledge architecture, no third-party access, and GDPR compliance.
frontend/src/pages/SecurityPrivacy.tsx: Detailed security and privacy policy page covering data collection, data usage, and storage security with structured cards and a header/footer layout.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page allowing users to configure theme, currency, notifications, and analytics visibility, persisting preferences to the backend via React Query mutations.
frontend/src/pages/SpendingLimits.tsx: Page for setting and tracking monthly spending limits per category (food, transport, shopping, etc.), comparing limits against real transaction data and displaying usage progress with AI-generated suggestions.
frontend/src/pages/Terms.tsx: Renders a static Terms & Conditions page for FinanceWise AI with sections covering agreement, accounts, intellectual property, liability, and contact info.
frontend/src/pages/TermsAndConditions.ts: A more detailed Terms & Conditions page with icon-decorated cards covering permitted use, account requirements, and prohibited activities, wrapped in Header and Footer components.
frontend/src/pages/Tools.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/pages/Transactions.tsx: Displays a searchable, editable transaction history table with support for deleting and updating transactions via dialog, using React Query hooks and currency formatting.
frontend/src/pages/Updates.tsx: Static page showing versioned release notes and a product roadmap with upcoming features like mobile app and bank integration.
frontend/src/pages/UseCases.tsx: Static page presenting six user persona cards (students, professionals, homeowners, etc.) with relevant financial use case scenarios for FinanceWise AI.
frontend/src/pages/UserGuidelines.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/requirements/REQ-10-quiz-no: Documents that the existing finance quiz system requires no modifications, listing protected files and confirming acceptance criteria that no new quiz questions or bulk additions should be introduced.
frontend/src/types/backend-types.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and enums mirroring the Motoko backend data structures, including UserPreferences, TransactionData, SavingsGoal, AIPrediction, BlogPost, QuizQuestion, QuizProgress, and ChatMessage.
frontend/src/types/budget-planner.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for the budget planner feature: BudgetInputs captures all user financial inputs, and BudgetPlan describes the computed budget output including allocation, expense breakdown, and cash flow.
frontend/src/types/local-types.ts: Re-exports selected types from backend-types.ts (QuizQuestion, Currency, SavingsGoal, TransactionData, BlogPost, etc.) for convenient frontend use, serving as a local type aggregation module.
frontend/src/types/transaction.ts: Defines a local Transaction interface with bigint date fields, mirroring the backend transaction structure for use in the frontend without relying on backend exports.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting, storing, retrieving, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based design tokens for colors, border radius, box shadows, accordion animations, and sidebar/chart color scales, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
frontend/vercel.json: Vercel deployment configuration specifying build commands, output directory, environment variables for the ICP backend canister, SPA rewrites, and security/cache response headers.
project_state.json: Tracks the FinanceWise AI project state including architecture notes, known issues (data loss on redeployment), and pending action requests to fix Motoko backend stable storage so user data persists across canister upgrades.
unknown.txt: Contains a performance optimization document outlining expected improvements, a monitoring dashboard description, load testing recommendations, and success KPI metrics for the FinanceWise AI frontend and backend.
